notes:
Headless generation uses a capable mid-tier generator model.
Priority: per-prompt model: override > PROMPT_IMPROVER_MODEL / settings.model > default_models[backend] > CLI default.
Defaults: sonnet (Claude Sonnet 5), grok-composer-2.5-fast, gemini-2.5-pro, gpt-5.5 — not haiku/mini, not host frontier (fable/opus).
